note: Synthetic baseline for demo purposes — not derived from a real assessment. Represents an earlier point with minimal established compliant history (compliant_days=1), so the hazard term (and therefore the premium) is at its highest under the stub-v0 formula. Real runs should show the premium settling downward as compliant history accrues.

verification.detail: seeded baseline, not a real run

premium.disclosure: premium_30d = max_loss_per_window x hazard x surcharge; illustrative seed only
